file_summary: This file implements URL-safe serialization for the itsdangerous library. It provides mixin and concrete classes that extend standard serializers to handle base64 encoding/decoding and optional zlib compression, making payloads safe for use in URLs.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire URLSafeSerializerMixin class definition. It includes imports, the class declaration with docstring, the default_serializer attribute, and the load_payload method. The load_payload method handles base64 decoding, optional zlib decompression (indicated by a leading '.'), and delegates to the parent class for JSON deserialization, with proper error handling for both decoding and decompression failures.

This window covers the dump_payload method of URLSafeSerializerMixin and the definitions of URLSafeSerializer and URLSafeTimedSerializer classes. The dump_payload method takes an object, serializes it to JSON via the parent class, optionally compresses it with zlib if it reduces size, base64 encodes it, and adds a '.' prefix if compressed. The URLSafeSerializer and URLSafeTimedSerializer classes inherit from the mixin and Serializer/TimedSerializer respectively, providing URL-safe versions with descriptive docstrings.
